---
name: New Topic Request
about: Request a new Topic so decks can be authored for it
title: "[Topic Request] <proposed-slug>"
labels: ["topic-request"]
---

## Proposed topic slug

<!-- lowercase, kebab-case, e.g. `kafka-rebalancing` -->

## Proposed title

<!-- Human-readable, e.g. "Kafka Rebalancing" -->

## Why this topic?

<!-- 1–2 paragraphs: who studies this, what gap it fills, what decks you'd
contribute next. -->

## Scope sketch

<!-- Optional: a few sample card prompts so reviewers can sanity-check the
scope. -->

## Acknowledgements

- [ ] I checked `topics.json` and this slug does not already exist (including aliases).
- [ ] I'm willing to author or co-author at least one deck for this topic.
